HGSS.379.0000:
Oh, honey. You’re making a Pokédex?\f
You must be battling all kinds
of Pokémon.\f
Try using this TM for a change.
HGSS.379.0002:
It’s Taunt.\f
Use it and the target Pokémon
can only use moves that do damage\r
to your Pokémon for a while.
HGSS.379.0004:
Did you see the shrine that pays homage
to the protector?\f
This protector watches over the forest
from across time.\f
I think that it must be a
Grass-type Pokémon.
